dashboard.title: Taker Order Analysis
dashboard.description: Analyze taker order sizes and price impact to find opportunities

list.name: pair
list.label: Currency
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT pair FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp > UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)) * 1000 ORDER BY pair

panels.title: Avg Order Size
panels.description: Average USD per order after grouping multi-fills

targets.rawSql: WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, SUM(notional_usd) as order_usd FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000)) SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_usd), 0) as value FROM orders

WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, COUNT(*) as fills FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000)) SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fills > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 1) as value FROM orders

WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, COUNT(*) as fills FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000)) SELECT ROUND(AVG(fills), 2) as value FROM orders

WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, COUNT(*) as fills, MIN(price) as min_px, MAX(price) as max_px FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) SELECT ROUND(AVG((max_px - min_px) / min_px * 100), 3) as value FROM orders

WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, SUM(notional_usd) as order_usd FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000)) SELECT ROUND(MAX(order_usd), 0) as value FROM orders

WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, COUNT(*) as fills, MIN(price) as min_px, MAX(price) as max_px FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) SELECT ROUND(MAX((max_px - min_px) / min_px * 100), 3) as value FROM orders

WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000)) SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM orders

panels.title: Order Size Distribution (Histogram)
panels.description: How many orders fall into each size bucket

targets.rawSql: WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, SUM(notional_usd) as order_usd FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000)), buckets AS (SELECT CASE WHEN order_usd < 25 THEN '01. <$25' WHEN order_usd < 50 THEN '02. $25-50' WHEN order_usd < 100 THEN '03. $50-100' WHEN order_usd < 250 THEN '04. $100-250' WHEN order_usd < 500 THEN '05. $250-500' WHEN order_usd < 1000 THEN '06. $500-1K' WHEN order_usd < 2500 THEN '07. $1K-2.5K' WHEN order_usd < 5000 THEN '08. $2.5K-5K' WHEN order_usd < 10000 THEN '09. $5K-10K' WHEN order_usd < 25000 THEN '10. $10K-25K' ELSE '11. $25K+' END as bucket, order_usd FROM orders) SELECT SUBSTRING(bucket, 5) as Size, COUNT(*) as Orders FROM buckets GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

panels.title: Price Impact Distribution (Histogram)
panels.description: How many multi-fill orders fall into each slippage bucket

targets.rawSql: WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, COUNT(*) as fills, MIN(price) as min_px, MAX(price) as max_px, (MAX(price) - MIN(price)) / MIN(price) * 100 as impact_pct FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1), buckets AS (SELECT CASE WHEN impact_pct < 0.01 THEN '01. <0.01%' WHEN impact_pct < 0.02 THEN '02. 0.01-0.02%' WHEN impact_pct < 0.05 THEN '03. 0.02-0.05%' WHEN impact_pct < 0.1 THEN '04. 0.05-0.1%' WHEN impact_pct < 0.2 THEN '05. 0.1-0.2%' WHEN impact_pct < 0.5 THEN '06. 0.2-0.5%' WHEN impact_pct < 1.0 THEN '07. 0.5-1%' ELSE '08. >1%' END as bucket, impact_pct FROM orders) SELECT SUBSTRING(bucket, 5) as Impact, COUNT(*) as Orders FROM buckets GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

panels.title: Order Size by Currency
panels.description: Average reconstructed order size per currency

targets.rawSql: WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, COUNT(*) as fills, SUM(notional_usd) as order_usd, MIN(price) as min_px, MAX(price) as max_px FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000)) SELECT pair as Currency, COUNT(*) as Orders, SUM(CASE WHEN fills > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as MultiFill, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fills > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 0) as PctMulti, ROUND(AVG(order_usd), 0) as AvgOrder, ROUND(MAX(order_usd), 0) as MaxOrder, ROUND(AVG(fills), 1) as AvgFills, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fills > 1 THEN (max_px - min_px) / min_px * 100 END), 3) as AvgImpact FROM orders GROUP BY pair ORDER BY AvgOrder DESC

panels.title: Price Impact by Order Size
panels.description: How much slippage do different order sizes experience?

targets.rawSql: WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, COUNT(*) as fills, SUM(notional_usd) as order_usd, MIN(price) as min_px, MAX(price) as max_px FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000)), buckets AS (SELECT CASE WHEN order_usd < 100 THEN '1. <$100' WHEN order_usd < 500 THEN '2. $100-500' WHEN order_usd < 1000 THEN '3. $500-1K' WHEN order_usd < 2500 THEN '4. $1K-2.5K' WHEN order_usd < 5000 THEN '5. $2.5K-5K' WHEN order_usd < 10000 THEN '6. $5K-10K' ELSE '7. $10K+' END as bucket, fills, order_usd, CASE WHEN fills > 1 THEN (max_px - min_px) / min_px * 100 ELSE 0 END as impact_pct FROM orders) SELECT SUBSTRING(bucket, 4) as OrderSize, COUNT(*) as Orders, ROUND(AVG(fills), 1) as AvgFills, SUM(CASE WHEN fills > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as WalkedBook, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fills > 1 THEN impact_pct END), 4) as AvgImpact, ROUND(MAX(impact_pct), 4) as MaxImpact FROM buckets GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, FLOOR(timestamp/1000/300)*300 as bucket, SUM(notional_usd) as order_usd FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000), bucket) SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(bucket) as time, 'Avg Order' as metric, ROUND(AVG(order_usd), 2) as value FROM orders GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY time

WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, FLOOR(timestamp/1000/300)*300 as bucket, COUNT(*) as fills, MIN(price) as min_px, MAX(price) as max_px FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000), bucket HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(bucket) as time, 'Avg Impact' as metric, ROUND(AVG((max_px - min_px) / min_px * 100), 4) as value FROM orders GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY time

panels.title: Large Taker Orders (>$1K with slippage)
panels.description: These orders walked the book - potential fill opportunities

targets.rawSql: WITH orders AS (SELECT buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) as sec, MIN(timestamp) as first_fill, COUNT(*) as fills, SUM(notional_usd) as order_usd, SUM(size) as total_size, MIN(price) as entry_px, MAX(price) as exit_px, (MAX(price) - MIN(price)) / MIN(price) * 100 as impact_pct FROM trade_sizes WHERE timestamp >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeFrom()) * 1000 AND timestamp <= UNIX_TIMESTAMP($__timeTo()) * 1000 AND buyer IS NOT NULL AND ('${pair:raw}' = '$__all' OR pair IN (${pair:sqlstring})) GROUP BY buyer, pair, side, FLOOR(timestamp/1000) HAVING SUM(notional_usd) >= 1000 AND COUNT(*) > 1) SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(first_fill/1000) as Time, pair as Pair, CASE WHEN side = 'B' THEN 'BUY' ELSE 'SELL' END as Side, fills as Fills, ROUND(order_usd, 0) as OrderUSD, ROUND(entry_px, 6) as EntryPx, ROUND(exit_px, 6) as ExitPx, ROUND(impact_pct, 4) as ImpactPct, CONCAT(LEFT(buyer, 6), '...') as Trader FROM orders ORDER BY first_fill DESC LIMIT 50

options.content:
### Trading Insight
The **Price Impact Distribution** shows where most slippage occurs. If most orders have <0.05% impact, tighter markets. If many orders have >0.2% impact, you can place limit orders further from mid and still get filled. Use the **Order Size by Currency** table to identify which pairs have the most aggressive takers.
